name: Peoples State Bank Of Hallettsville
description_short: Peoples State Bank of Hallettsville is an FDIC-insured community bank offering checking, savings, loans, and digital banking services to personal and business customers.
description_long:
Peoples State Bank of Hallettsville operates as a traditional community bank providing comprehensive financial services to individuals and businesses. The bank is FDIC-insured, meaning deposits are backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government up to applicable limits. Based on their website presence and service offerings, they serve the Hallettsville, Texas area with both retail and commercial banking needs.

The bank offers a full suite of deposit products including personal and business checking accounts, savings accounts, money market accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), and individual retirement accounts (IRAs). On the lending side, they provide real estate mortgages, consumer loans, agricultural loans, and commercial loans—services tailored to both individuals and local businesses. Their digital offerings include online banking, mobile banking, bill pay, and telephone banking, allowing customers remote access to their accounts.

Peoples State Bank distinguishes itself as a community-focused institution with personalized services such as same-day check printing, notary public services, safe deposit boxes, and direct deposit. They also offer practical conveniences like Zelle transfers, debit/ATM cards, and overdraft coverage. Their willingness to handle specialized payments (San Bernard Electric Cooperative payments) and provide gift cards suggests local integration and customer-centric service design.

However, the website lacks detailed information about specific rates, fees, minimum balances, loan terms, and competitive advantages. There is no clear information about branch locations, hours of operation, or customer service phone numbers prominently displayed. Prospective customers would need to contact the bank directly or visit in person to understand pricing structures and whether their offerings are competitive with larger regional or national banks.
services: Savings accounts and money market accounts
pros: FDIC-insured deposits with full U.S. Government backing
Comprehensive loan products including agricultural and commercial loans, addressing rural and business needs
Same-day check printing for business and personal customers
Multiple digital banking channels: online, mobile, bill pay, and telephone banking
Zelle money transfer integration for faster peer-to-peer payments
Safe deposit boxes and night deposit services for asset security
cons: Website does not display interest rates, APYs, or loan terms, requiring direct contact for pricing
No clear information about minimum account balances or monthly fees
Limited branch location and hours details on the website; no branch locator tool visible
Wire transfer fees ($15 for outgoing) and cashier's check fees ($5) may be higher than some competitors
Smaller community bank with potentially fewer ATM locations compared to regional or national banks
best_for: Local Hallettsville-area residents seeking community banking with personalized service
Agricultural and small business owners needing specialized lending products
Customers who value same-day check printing and notary services
Those preferring FDIC-insured deposits with local relationship banking over online-only options
diagnosis: Peoples State Bank of Hallettsville is best for community-oriented customers in the Hallettsville area seeking traditional banking services with local relationship banking and specialized lending for agriculture or small business. The main caveat is that the website provides minimal transparency on rates, fees, and specific terms—customers must contact the bank directly to compare offerings against competitors.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
